LanguageData.ELIFAW109VTransport.label: AW109 Agusta Westland (Transport)
LanguageData.ELIFAW109VTransport.description: DESCRIPTION: The AW109 is a helicopter designed for extremely long range quick deploy transport of goods and personnel. BASIC STATS: Health: 1500 LOGISTICS POTENTIAL: Cargo Capacity: 900kg Speed: 9 Passenger Capacity: 1-8 Fuel Per Tile: 9 Fuel Capacity: 1170 Round Trip Range: 65 Full Range: 130 Internal Power: 1200w ATTACK POTENTIAL: Bombing Run Capacity: n/a Precision Run Capacity: n/a Spread: n/a Distance between drops: n/a
